rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. The cited rule, Educ. Code §38.2091, governs school reporting on respiratory distress medication administration. The two provisions are unrelated.
quote: Sec. 38.2091. REPORT ON ADMINISTERING MEDICATION FOR RESPIRATORY DISTRESS.
_note: No relationship between proposed change and cited rule; no conflict detected.
